## ImmutableDate type

Date view without methods that mutate its internal timestamp.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ImmutableDate = Omit<Date, 'setDate' | 'setFullYear' | 'setHours' | 'setMilliseconds' | 'setMinutes' | 'setMonth' | 'setSeconds' | 'setTime' | 'setUTCDate' | 'setUTCFullYear' | 'setUTCHours' | 'setUTCMilliseconds' | 'setUTCMinutes' | 'setUTCMonth' | 'setUTCSeconds' | 'setYear'>;
```
